choices.text: CEI pattern: Checks → Effects (state update) → Interactions (external call) LAST. State zeroed before transfer so reentrant call sees updated balance. Add OpenZeppelin ReentrancyGuard nonReentrant modifier for defense-in-depth.

(bool success,) = payable(to).call{value: amount}(""); require(success). .transfer's 2300 gas stipend broken since EIP-1884. .call forwards all available gas; check success return. Always use .call for ETH.
